name: tdpvp-project
description: Realtime PvP side-scrolling tower defence monorepo foundation

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix packages/shared && npm install --prefix apps/server && npm install --prefix apps/client
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --prefix apps/server
scripts.dev:client: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --prefix apps/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/server && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/client && npm run typecheck --prefix packages/shared
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --prefix apps/server && npm run build --prefix apps/client
